Name: Number of times SW-Reviewer Declined appears in the same case as SW-Reviewer Unavailable or SW-Reviewer No Response

Name: Percentage of SW-Reviewer Declined out of all reviewer-related activities (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Unavailable, SW-Reviewer No Response)

Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Declined' out of all 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Percentage of cases where SW-Reviewer Declined appears more than once before a successful SW-Reviewer Agreed

Name: Percentage of SW-Reviewer Declined that occur after SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days

Name: Frequency of SW-Reviewer Declined compared to SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants

Name: Percentage of SW-Reviewer Declined that occur in the initial reviewer selection phase (i.e., before any SW-Reviewer Agreed)
